name: Strategic Environmental & Energy Resources, Inc.
business: Strategic Environmental & Energy Resources, Inc. (SEER) provides environmental products and solutions, including patented dry scrubber systems for hydrogen sulfide removal, waste destruction technology using pyrolytic and plasma processes, and biochar soil amendment pellets. The company sells to customers in North America, including landfill operations, agricultural and food product processors, wastewater treatment facilities, petroleum product refiners, and medical waste generators.

exposures.sentence: MV designs and sells patented and/or proprietary, dry scrubber solutions for management of Hydrogen Sulfide (H2S) in biogas, landfill gas, and petroleum processing operations.
MV designs and sells patented and/or proprietary, dry scrubber solutions for management of Hydrogen Sulfide (H2S) in biogas, landfill gas, and petroleum processing operations.
PelleChar commenced sales in 2019 of its proprietary pellets containing the proven and superior Biochar Now product starting with the landscaping and big agriculture markets.

PWS has developed a patented waste destruction technology using a pyrolytic heating process combined with non-thermal plasma assisted oxidation, designed and intended for the clean destruction of hazardous chemical and biological waste (i.e., medical waste).
Most recently, SEER is focusing on decarbonization technologies and strategies, as well as monetization and tokenization of fully-insured biochar carbon credits.

catalysts.event: R&D budget allocation of less than $50,000 in fiscal year 2025
catalysts.sentence: As the Company brings its organic fertilizer products, Pellechar10 and Pellechar30, to market, it plans to allocate a small R&D budget in fiscal year 2025, anticipated to be less than $50,000.
